content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Removed the `result` Nix store symlink from git tracking via `git rm --cached result`. The symlink was historically committed and a ralph-burning checkpoint modified it on this branch, causing it to appear in the diff. It is already listed in .gitignore (line 5), so once removed from the index it will stay untracked. The file still exists on disk for local Nix builds.

## Steps

0. [Completed] Verified result symlink exists as a tracked file modified on this branch (committed in checkpoint 177656f), pointing to a machine-local /nix/store/ path. Confirmed it is already in .gitignore line 5.
1. [Completed] Ran git rm --cached result to remove the symlink from the index without deleting the on-disk file. Staged deletion is ready for the next commit.
2. [Completed] Validated: 7 final_review_planner tests pass, 4 preflight_check tests pass (test-stub feature), cargo fmt clean. No impact on functionality.

## Validation Evidence

- cargo test final_review_planner: 7/7 pass
- cargo test --features test-stub preflight_check: 4/4 pass
- cargo fmt --check: clean (exit 0)
- git status shows result staged for deletion; symlink still exists on disk
- .gitignore line 5 already contains 'result' — will not be re-tracked

## Outstanding Risks

None identified.
